body:
## Summary
- move the about-the-test seen marker from render into an effect-scoped settings-store subscription
- add focused validator summaries and mutation guards for the about route seen-effect contract
- align first-run about modal suppression with launch-ad suppression for `/onboarding`

## Validation
- `./node_modules/.bin/prettier --check app/about-the-test.tsx components/onboarding/FirstRunAboutTheTestModal.tsx scripts/validate-content.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-about-the-test-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-onboarding-route-copy`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-onboarding-route-header-parity.test.js --test-name-pattern "about-the-test marks|seen-effect|first-run"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run validate:content`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:theme-discipline -- --test-name-pattern "about|onboarding|theme|FirstRun"`
- `NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:a11y-labels -- --test-name-pattern "about|onboarding|FirstRun"`
- `CI=1 EXPO_NO_TELEMETRY=1 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run build:web:export -- --max-workers 2`
- `CI=1 E2E_PORT=4192 NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' npm run test:e2e -- tests/e2e/about-test-seen-effect.spec.ts tests/e2e/launch-modal-accessibility.spec.ts --workers=1`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`
title: onboarding: mark about guide seen after mount
